title: Quarterly Operating Model Reset
companyContext: A mid-size services company is moving from ad-hoc execution to a standardized cross-functional operating rhythm.
triggerEvent: Leadership committed to a 90-day performance improvement plan after missed delivery targets.
constraints: No headcount increase for this quarter
Two critical client projects cannot be delayed
successCriteria: Clear ownership for every major workflow handoff
Weekly coordination cycle adopted by all functions
At least 80% sprint commitment reliability by week 6
